title: Senior React Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior React Engineer to join our core framework team. You will help build the future of next-generation web applications, collaborating closely with creators of Next.js.
requirements: Deep understanding of React, Next.js, and modern browser APIs. Experience optimizing performance in heavy client-side applications.
responsibilities: Architect clean frontend components. Collaborate with UX designers and product managers. Improve build pipelines and core web vitals.

title: Staff Node.js Architect
description: Join Stripe's core infrastructure team to build robust payment APIs handling billions of requests daily. You will define technical standards and guide engineering practices.
requirements: Expertise in Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Redis, and microservices architecture. Strong cryptography and API security practices.
responsibilities: Design secure APIs, mentor junior developers, perform code reviews, and guarantee 99.999% uptime of our high-volume services.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description: Airbnb is looking for a versatile Full-Stack Engineer who is passionate about creating high-quality booking experiences. You will design, build, and deploy customer-facing interfaces and scalable backend systems.
requirements: Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Strong communication skills.
responsibilities: Implement pixel-perfect designs, optimize backend query times, and coordinate with the global design system team.

title: Lead UI/UX Architect
description: Linear builds high-quality software trackers. We are looking for a UI/UX expert who writes code (CSS/React) and brings pristine attention to detail to design flawless developer tools.
requirements: Strong visual design skills, expert Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Figma mockup design capabilities.
responsibilities: Collaborate closely with founders, build reusable dynamic UI components, and maintain our premium dark-mode web experience.

title: Backend Platform Engineer
description: Supabase is an open source Firebase alternative. We are seeking a senior systems engineer to work on PostgreSQL integration, real-time database listener systems, and Auth microservices.
requirements: Strong Node.js, Go or Elixir background. Advanced SQL knowledge and PostgreSQL performance tuning capabilities.
responsibilities: Develop open-source backend libraries, improve connection pool limits, and design highly available cloud infrastructure.
